titles.title: Who At My Door Is Standing

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who at may door is standing Patiently drawing near? Entrance within He is asking Who is the voice I hear?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sweetly the tones are falling Open the door for Me! If thou will heed My calling, I will abide with thee.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lonely without, He is standing Lonely within am I While I am still delaying Will He not pass me by?
